entities.name: shot
entities.rationale: A single local JSON file. The screenshot PNG is a LOCAL sibling binary file written next to the JSON via a native fs boundary — not offloaded to any object store.

accessPatterns.source: repro: shot.ingest writes the PNG locally

blobs.key: annotate.<safeKey>.png  (a LOCAL sibling file, not a bucket key)

immutability.why: re-shot overwrites the entry and its PNG
